utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (with flight details and costs), accommodation (with costs), activities (with costs), additional_services (with costs), and total_budget (with complete cost breakdown). In the final package: (1) destination is fully specified as 'Lisbon, Portugal'; (2) travel_dates specified as '2025-02-10 to 2025-02-14'; (3) transportation includes detailed flight info (airline, departure/arrival airports, class, cost, baggage) – fully specified; (4) accommodation includes hotel name, type, rating, room type, amenities, total_cost – fully specified; (5) activities listed with details and total_cost – fully specified; (6) additional_services includes dining with restaurant, style, total_cost – fully specified; (7) total_budget includes currency, total_cost, and cost breakdown – fully specified. Therefore, all 7 items are covered completely.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the destination 'Lisbon, Portugal', which has a rating of 8 in the ground truth. The included activities are 'City Walking Tour' (rating 8), 'Golf Day' (rating 10), and 'Cultural Visit'—while 'Cultural Visit' is not explicitly listed, the closest equivalent is 'Museum Day Pass' (rating 7) since it represents cultural exploration.
